source.privacy_note: Personal recipient details, phone numbers, addresses, and device serial numbers are intentionally omitted from this working manifest.

applied_hardware.role: glasses display and headset endpoint for AR Studio spatial experience
compute/control companion running YodaOS-Master for AR Studio

kit_interpretation: This matches Rokid AR Studio: the official platform describes AR Studio as Rokid Max Pro glasses plus Rokid Station Pro host, running YodaOS-Master for spatial computing.

loan_terms_summary.allowed_use: Rokid system app experience, adaptation, and development for the event/project.
loan_terms_summary.risk_owner: Borrower is responsible for loss, damage, repair, and timely return under the loan terms.

project_fit.reason: The final project is a Rokid glasses spatial memory layer over a real campus exhibition wall. Max Pro provides the glasses display endpoint; Station Pro provides the AR Studio/YodaOS-Master companion for spatial computing. The Windows host remains the localhost/LAN control machine before and during field demo.
project_fit.implementation_rule: Hardware arrival should replace only the input/display layer. Space API, space_demo.json, mission state machine, AI schema/prompt, service action, write-back, and evidence chain remain shared across Web, Unity fallback, and Rokid.

local_evidence.description: Group chat export under the workspace chat-export folder; relevant messages confirm Studio/Lite, then Studio preference.
Final evidence decision table: Campus Hidden Layer / three-anchor route is the only main direction.
Technical route table: P0 Web/Unity mock first, P1 Rokid ecosystem / UXR / OpenXR enhancement after hardware.
